overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a wooden harbor dock in an industrial port setting. The overcast sky casts diffused light over the scene featuring green wooden warehouses, cargo crates, sailing ships, and industrial cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden dock between warehouse and harbor water

events.description: NPC dock worker in suspenders appears and walks alongside ego before stopping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dock beside the green warehouse, glancing at cargo crates and barrels

notable_agents.action: dock worker walking alongside ego then stopping to let him pass

entered.detail: large green wooden industrial warehouse with multiple windows and sliding doors
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
calm gray water of the harbor with gentle ripples
tall-masted sailing vessel moored in the harbor
stacked wooden shipping crates and boxes
stacked blue metal barrels near the warehouse wall
wooden barrels lined up along the warehouse
tall iron lamp post with hanging lantern
stacks of burlap sacks containing goods

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock flanked by a green warehouse on the right and harbor water on the left. Cargo crates, barrels, and burlap sacks line the walkway. Around 8 seconds, a dock worker in suspenders appears and walks briefly alongside the character before stopping.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with industrial crane

events.description: narrow dock opens into wide open area with large industrial crane becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the dock widens, approaching the large crane structure

entered.detail: massive iron industrial crane with lattice boom structure

segments.scene_description: The dock opens up into a wide area revealing a large industrial crane. The green warehouse recedes into the background on the right while the harbor opens up to the left. The character walks toward the crane structure as the space widens considerably.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with panoramic water views

agents.ego_description: walking through the open dock area passing the large crane, overlooking the harbor with multiple ships

entered.detail: industrial structures and warehouses visible across the harbor
several tall ships and vessels moored in the harbor basin

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the expansive open dock area with the large crane now on the left. The view opens up to show the full harbor with multiple sailing ships and distant industrial buildings across the water. The green warehouse returns to the right side as the dock curves.

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrower section of dock beside a moored steamship

entered.detail: small steam-powered tugboat with smokestack moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: The dock narrows again with the green warehouse wall on the right and a small steamship moored on the left. The character walks past wooden barrels and crates stacked along the warehouse wall, with the harbor water visible between the dock and the steamship.

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden gate with industrial smokestacks visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke in the distance
elevated water tank on wooden supports
wooden gate structure blocking the end of the dock
small corrugated metal shed or building

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the end of the dock where industrial smokestacks and a water tower dominate the skyline. A wooden fence and gate block the path ahead, while a small industrial building sits on the left. The green warehouse continues along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden harbor dock that transitions from a narrow industrial corridor into a wide port vista before closing back into a restricted industrial zone. It begins with the character walking past a green warehouse and stacked cargo crates, briefly accompanied by a dock worker in suspenders. As the path opens up, the scene expands into a wide dock area dominated by a large industrial crane and a panoramic view of sailing ships and distant buildings across the water. The environment then shifts as the dock narrows again, guiding the character past a moored steamship and more stacked barrels along the warehouse wall. Finally, the camera moves toward the end of the dock where the skyline is filled by industrial smokestacks and a water tower, ending at a wooden fence and gate.
